sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS PROFESSIONAL FOOTBALL.  FIND OUT THE OTHER CALLER'S FAVORITE PRO FOOTBALL TEAM AND WHERE IT'S HEADED THIS YEAR.       DO YOU AGREE WITH THE CALLER'S PREDICTION?
raw_output:
ParticipantA: How are you doing today?
ParticipantB: I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
ParticipantA: I'm good too, thanks. So, what got you interested in calling me today?
ParticipantB: Well, I heard you're a big football fan.
ParticipantA: That's right, I love football. How did you know that?
ParticipantB: I saw on your LinkedIn profile that you're a big fan of the sport.
ParticipantA: Oh, I didn't realize it was visible on there. Well, what team do you support?
ParticipantB: I'm a big Dallas Cowboys fan. How about you?
ParticipantA: I'm a diehard New England Patriots fan.
ParticipantB: Nice, I can't stand those guys.
ParticipantA: Really? Why not?
ParticipantB: They just seem to win all the time, and it's annoying.
ParticipantA: I can see how that would be frustrating, but I still think they're a great team.
ParticipantB: Well, I guess we'll have to agree to disagree on that one. But what do you think about the upcoming season?
ParticipantA: I think it's going to be a great season. I'm really excited about the new players the Patriots have signed.
ParticipantB: Really? I don't know about that. I think the Cowboys are going to dominate this year.
ParticipantA: Oh, come on. The Cowboys haven't won a Super Bowl in over 25 years.
ParticipantB: That's true, but I think this is the year they turn it around.
ParticipantA: I don't know, I'm not as confident in their chances.
ParticipantB: Well, we'll just have to wait and see, won't we?
ParticipantA: Absolutely. So, what do you do for a living?
ParticipantB: I'm a software engineer. How about you?
ParticipantA: I'm studying computer science in college.
ParticipantB: Nice, I wish I had gone that route.
ParticipantA: It's a tough major, but it's definitely worth it.
ParticipantB: I agree. Well, it was great talking to you, even if we don't agree on football teams.
ParticipantA: Yeah, it was really nice chatting with you too. Have a good day.
ParticipantB: You too, take care.
